title: ATKs Mods
description: This modpack enhances your game by boosting FPS, optimizing performance, and delivering a smoother, more responsive experience while maintaining a clean and polished look.
body:
🚀 **Performance**

ATK’s Mods are designed to boost FPS and optimize performance, making your game run smoother and more responsive. Each mod has been carefully selected to improve speed and stability while remaining safe for your worlds.

🎨 **OptiFine Compatibility**

This modpack supports most OptiFine features, including shaders, connected textures, and zoom. Most resource packs that require OptiFine will work here as well, giving you a smooth and flexible visual experience.

🧩 **Familiar Feel**

With ATK’s Mods, you can enjoy Minecraft the way you remember it. Features like controller support, improved menus, and other quality-of-life enhancements keep the experience familiar while making it better.

🌍 **Works Everywhere**

This modpack focuses on performance and does not include content-altering mods, meaning you can play on any world or server without issues. It’s designed to work seamlessly across different setups for the best experience possible.
